text: Byron is building AI agents for tax.
There are too many documents, not enough people.
Every season, this just keeps getting worse.
So we raised six and a half million dollars to fix it.
The tools just haven't kept up.
Accountants still key in data by hand,
form by form, field by field for every return.
And all of this is automated with Byron,
our business tax platform.
Partnerships, S-Corps, C-Corps, all done.
Byron pulls in prior year financials
and automatically generates new Excel workbooks
with live formulas.
Schedule and adjustments computed automatically.
State modifications, hand on.
Same as last year, in minutes.
It also handles your most complex documents,
including K1 packages with footnotes,
state variants and K3s,
and feeds this directly into your workflows.
Byron processes every document
and tells your team exactly where to look.
Every field gets a confidence score.
High confidence, it's ready.
Something off, it's flagged.
Something missing, Byron reaches out to your client.
Your team only reviews the exceptions.
Our team came out of Amazon's AGI org
and we've already processed hundreds
of thousands of documents.
We partner with platforms like Trust and Canopy
so Byron can work with the tools your firm already uses.
And we built Byron with one rule.
The accountant is always in control.
This is Byron, AI agents for tax.
See how it works for your firm at usebyron.com.
